summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster; no GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: This is a plausible narrow fix for linked issue #59360, but proof is incomplete and the shard should not invent a canonical or close anything.
The PR is tied to a real provider feature gap but needs proof and maintainer/product judgment; it is not a duplicate or close candidate in this inventory shard.
Keep as an independent PR needing normal maintainer review and failing-check resolution; do not merge or close from this inventory shard.
This should remain related to the doctor-health stack, especially #86627, rather than being closed or treated as a standalone canonical in this inventory shard.
Keep related to the SIGUSR1/restart family while preserving it as distinct work; failing proof and lint block any fixed-by-candidate closeout or merge recommendation.
